ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL(smartlists__Data_Source_Type__c, 'Apex Data Source') && ISBLANK( smartlists__SObject__c ) && (smartlists__Enable_CRUD_Actions__c || smartlists__Enable_Delete_Record_Action__c || smartlists__Enable_Edit_Record_Action__c || smartlists__Enable_New_Record_Action__c)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: SObject is required when record actions are enabled on an Apex Data Source
